name: twenty
description: Create Twenty apps, search Twenty documentation, prepare app listing assets, and connect to Twenty workspaces with MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Create apps, search docs, and connect Twenty MCP
interface.longDescription: Use Twenty to scaffold a new app with create-twenty-app, search the official Twenty documentation through the bundled docs MCP server, set up the local development instance, authorize the app, run the Twenty app CLI, prepare README and marketplace visuals, configure a workspace-specific Twenty MCP server with OAuth, and troubleshoot generated project issues.
